name: tdd-subagent
summary: Provides tdd-step.py state machine, dispatch-tdd-subagent.py prompt assembler, and the tdd-subagent agent. The rabbit-feature-touch orchestration skill now lives in the rabbit-feature feature.
deprecation_criterion: When the TDD cycle is natively supported by the rabbit CLI.
spec_no_change_reason: spec v1.19.0 was committed by dispatcher in commit 03ac513b before subagent dispatch (per Inv 12)
